hooks.command: gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)"; set -- "$gcd/the-works"/HANDOVER*.md; [ -f "$1" ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"One or more HANDOVER files are present in .git/the-works/: a child has returned. Ingest them FIRST per the handover skill (batch rule: all in one pass, oldest-first; read, act on the chatter, promote any standing item to TODO, then delete each) before responding to the user."}}'; exit 0

root="$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null)"; gcd="$(git rev-parse --git-common-dir 2>/dev/null)"; [ -n "$root" ] || exit 0; wm=""; [ -f "$gcd/the-works/migrated" ] && wm="$(cat "$gcd/the-works/migrated")"; latest=""; for d in "$root/migrations" "$root"/.ai/repositories/*/*/migrations; do [ -d "$d" ] || continue; for f in "$d"/*.md; do [ -e "$f" ] || continue; b="${f##*/}"; b="${b%.md}"; [ "$b" \> "$latest" ] && latest="$b"; done; done; [ -n "$latest" ] && [ "$latest" \> "$wm" ] && printf '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"UserPromptSubmit","additionalContext":"Package migrations are pending (watermark: %s, latest: %s). Read every migrations/*.md newer than the watermark (repo root or .ai/repositories/*/*/migrations/), merge them and apply the net effect - every step guarded by observable state - then write the latest name to .git/the-works/migrated. See AGENTS.files.md Migrations section."}}' "${wm:-none}" "$latest"; exit 0
